purpose: Prove IAMScope does not overclaim validated admin reachability through broad-looking same-account root trust when an MFA trust condition is present.
claim_surface: IAMScope can retain broad-looking trust structure while preserving trust-condition evidence.
IAMScope does not emit a validated admin reachability claim for the Env11 alice->broad-conditioned-admin path.
benchmark_proves: For the Env11 alice->broad-conditioned-admin path, scenario.json contains the expected sts:AssumeRole permission edge.
For the Env11 target role, scenario.json contains a trust edge.
Scenario.json contains at least one TRUST_CONDITION constraint with aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent evidence.
The Env11 target trust edge is bound to a TRUST_CONDITION constraint.
For the same source and target, IAMScope emits zero validated admin_reachability findings.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not prove runtime MFA satisfaction checking.
It does not prove broader broad-trust condition handling beyond this narrow case.
unknowns_remaining: Whether other broad trust principal shapes behave the same way remains unknown here.
Whether other condition operators should resolve to blocked rather than inconclusive remains unknown here.

environment.notes: Single-account IAM-only assume-role path to an admin-equivalent role with same-account root trust gated by MFA.

ground_truth.reason: Alice has AssumeRole permission and the target role is admin-equivalent, but broad same-account root trust requires aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent and the benchmark session does not prove that condition satisfied.

directly_proven_if_pass: The exact Env11 alice->broad-conditioned-admin permission edge exists structurally.
The Env11 target role has broad-looking trust structure.
The trust edge carries TRUST_CONDITION evidence for aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent.
The exact Env11 alice->broad-conditioned-admin path is not falsely emitted as validated admin reachability.
strongly_supported_if_pass: IAMScope can avoid shortcutting broad-looking conditioned trust into validated admin reachability.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader broad-trust condition coverage remains only implied.
